title: FamilySearch
description: Discover your ancestors, build your family tree, and prepare family names for temple ordinances.

title: Gospel Library
description: Access scriptures, conference talks, manuals, videos, and official Church resources.

title: Temple Locator
description: Find temple locations, schedules, announcements, and temple information throughout the world.

title: Holy Bible
description: The Old and New Testaments bearing witness of Jesus Christ, the Savior and Redeemer of the world.

title: Book of Mormon
description: Another Testament of Jesus Christ that strengthens faith in the Savior and His gospel.

title: Doctrine and Covenants
description: Modern revelations teaching priesthood authority, temple covenants, and the gathering of Israel.

title: Pearl of Great Price
description: Sacred writings containing the books of Moses and Abraham and teachings about God's plan of salvation.

title: General Conference
description: Messages from living prophets and apostles centered on Jesus Christ and His restored gospel.

title: Come, Follow Me
description: Home-centered gospel learning resource for individuals and families.

title: The Oath and Covenant of the Priesthood
description: Doctrine and Covenants 84 teaches the blessings, responsibilities, and promises associated with the Melchizedek Priesthood.

title: Endowed from on High
description: Official temple preparation guide that helps members understand temple covenants and ordinances.

title: Temples of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints
description: Official information about temples, ordinances, dedications, announcements, and temple blessings.

title: The Family: A Proclamation to the World
description: Prophetic declaration regarding the divine role of the family in God's plan of happiness.

title: Restoration of Sealing Keys
description: Doctrine and Covenants 110 records Elijah's appearance in the Kirtland Temple and the restoration of the sealing power.

title: The Living Christ
description: A powerful testimony from modern apostles declaring Jesus Christ as the Living Son of God.
